name: Fruit-Glazed Acorn Squash Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the squash several times with a fork and place on 2 layers of paper towel in the microwave.
2. Microwave on high for 5-6 minutes or until slightly tender.
3. Cool completely.
4. Cut off the ends of the squash and remove and discard the seeds.
5. Cut the squash into 1-inch thick slices and arrange them on a 13x9-inch baking dish.
6. Combine the pineapple juice, orange juice, melted butter, currants, brown sugar, cornstarch, and ground cloves in a bowl to make the glaze.
7. Pour the glaze over the squash.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F until the squash is tender, basting frequently with the glaze.
